label: Live Order Book
description: HFT-style live order book with bid/ask columns, depth aggregation, and spread legend.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file. CRYPTO_VENUES/TRADFI_VENUES from lib/config ✓.

1.1.note: Data from useMarketsData().liveBookUpdates — no inline fetch ✓.

1.3.note: liveBookUpdates is market-wide book data — all participants shown by design.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (isBatch → liveBookUpdates=[] → isEmpty → empty state shown) / paper ✓ (snapshot, no ticking).

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(); isBatch disables liveBookUpdates ✓.

3.3.note: Human: toggle to batch — confirm empty state shown with correct message.

3.4.note: Human: confirm batch indicator visible in layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: context comment notes snapshot behavior (no live ticking). Read-only display widget.

3.6.note: useLiveFeed is memoized slice — no setInterval. isBatch returns [] from context, so nothing to tick.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human needed for 3.3/3.4.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers — read-only book display ✓.

4.3.note: Human: verify bid/ask columns render at depth=2/5/10.

4.4.note: Human: verify live updates appear in rows.

4.8.note: Human: verify horizontal scroll with dynamic column count at bookDepth=10.

l4.notes: 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. Human needed for 4.3/4.4/4.8 (especially dynamic column alignment at depth=10).

5.1.note: Target: HFT/market-making strategies on crypto and tradfi venues. Widget shows multi-level book with bid/ask aggregation. DeFi shows empty state directing user to defi-amm widget.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 9 tests covering order book rows render + depth bars + my-orders overlay + empty/loading state. See tests/widgets/markets/markets-live-book.test.tsx

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl — uses CSS vars (--pnl-positive, --pnl-negative) and Tailwind opacity tokens (cyan-500/40, yellow-500/40) for legend swatches ✓.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in widget — useLiveFeed internally memoized ✓.

l7.notes: 7.1–7.4/7.6/7.7 all pass. Note: cyan-500/40 and yellow-500/40 used for legend color swatches are Tailwind semantic (not hardcoded hex) — acceptable. 7.5 deferred.

8.1.note: text-[10px] x8 and text-[9px] x1 in table cells and legend (lines 34/37/45/65/74/83/121/140/149). HFT density pattern — no Tailwind scale token below text-xs. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.3.note: Uses LiveFeedWidget (shared), Badge from components/ui/* ✓. Raw <table> used for HFT book — appropriate, no UI primitive covers this layout.

8.4.note:
No bare , no unlabelled , no
without role. All interactive via LiveFeedWidget wrapper ✓.

8.5.note: Human: verify horizontal scroll at minW=8, minH=4 with bookDepth=10.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density). 8.3 raw <table> justified for HFT book layout. 8.2/8.4 pass. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Distinct from order-flow (market-wide table) and defi-amm (AMM table). Book widget shows bid/ask levels — specialized HFT layout not mergeable.

relationships.notes: Driven by markets-controls (assetClass, bookDepth). Shares liveBookUpdates data channel. Peer to order-flow and defi-amm.

dataContract.notes: Mock: generateLiveBookUpdates() via MarketsDataContext. In batch mode context returns [] (no updates). Production: L2 order book feed via WebSocket per venue. Dynamic column count = bookDepth.

gaps: DeFi asset class shows empty state — no AMM book format yet
coverage.notes: Shows multi-level order book for crypto and tradfi. DeFi directs user to defi-amm widget.

knownIssues: isBatch disables liveBookUpdates in context (returns []) — widget correctly shows empty state. isBatch flag not propagated to widget directly but handled via data.
bookDepth drives dynamic column count — column header/cell alignment at depth=10 needs human verification.

findings.description: markets-live-book-widget.tsx — ~10 user-visible strings (legend labels, empty messages)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: markets-live-book-widget.tsx:34,37,45,65,74,83,121,140,149 — text-[10px]/text-[9px] used in HFT book cells
findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern accepted across codebase. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px).
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro and text-[9px] with text-nano across header badges, legend footer, book table cells, and trade aggressor marker.
